title: Bee Removal Morris Heights Bronx NYC | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Morris Heights, Bronx. Safe, humane hive extraction for homes & buildings. Licensed experts. Call today: $350-$550.
intro: Morris Heights residents facing bee infestations need fast, professional solutions to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in safe, humane bee removal services throughout Morris Heights, from the residential blocks near Highbridge Park to the multi-family buildings along University Avenue. Our licensed technicians safely extract hives and prevent future colonies from establishing in your Bronx property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Morris Heights and the greater Bronx area with specialized bee removal expertise. Our team understands the unique architectural challenges of Morris Heights' brownstones, apartment buildings, and row houses, providing tailored solutions that protect both residents and beneficial pollinators.
localContext: Morris Heights' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, classic Bronx architecture, and proximity to green spaces like Highbridge Park creates ideal conditions for bee colonies in eaves, vents, and wall cavities. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and community gardens, while beautiful, can attract swarms during spring and summer months, requiring prompt professional intervention.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee emergency in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Morris Heights and the Bronx. Our team understands that bee swarms and active hives near entryways pose immediate risks, so we prioritize emergency calls and typically arrive within 2-4 hours for urgent situations.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 bee removal price include?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes complete inspection, safe hive extraction, removal of honeycomb and bees, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and proper sealing of entry points. The final price depends on hive location, size, and accessibility within your Morris Heights property.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation, working with local beekeepers to safely transfer honeybee colonies. We understand the ecological importance of bees and only recommend extermination for aggressive Africanized bee species or when relocation poses safety risks to Morris Heights residents.

faqs.question: Can bees return after removal in Morris Heights buildings?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes preventative measures to stop re-infestation. We seal entry points, remove pheromone traces that attract new swarms, and provide recommendations specific to Morris Heights building types. We also offer a service guarantee and will return if bees reestablish within the warranty period.
